ns0:entry.ns0:title: CesiumGS/cesium
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CesiumGS/cesium
Language: javascript
An open-source JavaScript library for world-class 3D globes and maps 🌎

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliusBrussee/caveman
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliusBrussee/caveman
Language: javascript
🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LibreSpark/LibreTV
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LibreSpark/LibreTV
Language: javascript
一分钟搭建影视站，支持Vercel/Docker等部署方式

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/claude-relay-service
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/claude-relay-service
Language: javascript
CRS-自建Claude Code镜像，一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Droid 订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
Language: javascript
Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fanmingming/live
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fanmingming/live
Language: javascript
✯ 可直连访问的电视/广播图标库与相关工具项目 ✯ 🔕 永久免费 直连访问 完整开源 不断完善的台标 支持IPv4/IPv6双栈访问 🔕

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gsd-build/get-shit-done
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done
Language: javascript
A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code by TÂCHES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: prebid/Prebid.js
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/prebid/Prebid.js
Language: javascript
Setup and manage header bidding advertising partners without writing code or confusing line items. Prebid.js is open source and free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: projectdiscovery/nuclei-templates
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei-templates
Language: javascript
Community curated list of templates for the nuclei engine to find security vulnerabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rabbitmq/rabbitmq-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rabbitmq/rabbitmq-server
Language: javascript
Open source RabbitMQ: core server and tier 1 (built-in) plugins

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thedotmack/claude-mem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
Language: javascript
Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zarazhangrui/frontend-slides
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zarazhangrui/frontend-slides
Language: javascript
Create beautiful slides on the web using a coding agent's frontend skills
